specific_mechanism: Erdős-Rényi sparse cross-attention with new threshold parameters and new learnable sparsity gate (new module)
llm_application: Erdős-Rényi sparse cross-attention: introduce a NEW learnable module with its own parameters (new threshold parameters) implementing Erdős-Rényi sparse cross-attention; module adds new learnable sparsity gate and new inter-token pathway, creating new architectural-topology change distinct from baseline; module's parameters are not derivable from existing weights
